title: InterPro  - Technology - Microsoft Teams - Joining a Teams Meeting as a Guest
body: Joining a Microsoft Teams meeting as a guest using an email invite Check your email for the Teams Meeting invite. From the email click the Join Microsoft Teams Meeting link. Select the Continue on this browser option to join in a browser. If preferred, download the program. Enter your name and choose your audio and video settings. Click the Join Now button to be admitted into the meeting.
